subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be My salutations! The servant who is present hath made mention, before the Countenance of the Wronged One, of the letter from His honour the Ḥájí, upon him be My salutations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک سلامی عبد حاضر مکتوب جناب حاجی علیه سلامی را تلقاء وجه مظلوم ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @the ephemeral and the eternal, @consultation, @rejection, opposition and persecution
